mnemonics.title: Order of Acquisition Methods
mnemonics.content: **L**et **L**azy **F**orensic **P**ractitioners **C**hallenge **J**udges. (Logical -> File System -> Physical -> Cloud -> JTAG/Chip-Off). This reminds you to use the least invasive method first.

mnemonics.title: Challenges of Mobile Forensics
mnemonics.content: **D**evices **S**ure **H**ave **E**normous **V**ariety **A**nd **C**omplexity. (Diversity, Security, Hardware, Encryption, Volatility, Acquisition, Cloud).
